hn.title: Throwing AI-generated walls of text into conversations
hn.takeaway: AI-generated content floods conversations; builders identify friction points and moderation patterns.

lobsters.title: Aggressive AI scrapers are making it kinda suck to run wikis
lobsters.takeaway: Training bots overload wiki infrastructure; operators explore rate-limiting and bot-blocking tactics.

chinese_community.title: 半導體背後的關鍵耗材廠，意德士切入 2 奈米與 AI 伺服器
chinese_community.takeaway: 耗材廠搶進 2nm 與 AI 伺服器市場，供應鏈角色轉變。

ai_bloggers.title: Recent Developments in LLM Architectures: KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention
ai_bloggers.takeaway: KV-cache variants (sharing, compression) emerge as core inference optimizations across model families.

ai_bloggers.title: Why We Think
ai_bloggers.takeaway: Chain-of-thought scaling unlocks reasoning by trading inference compute for accuracy gains.

ai_bloggers.title: The Revenge of the Data Scientist
ai_bloggers.takeaway: Annotation and eval frameworks become production infrastructure; data science techniques resurface.

ai_bloggers.title: Giving Agents Computers — Ivan Burazin, Daytona
ai_bloggers.takeaway: Agent architectures that control browsers/CLIs solve multi-step problems; Daytona demonstrates the pattern.

ai_bloggers.title: Datasette Agent
ai_bloggers.takeaway: Agentic pattern for data exploration reduces boilerplate versus direct API interaction.
